text_block_list.name: Romance Manga Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
(I need to go home, but I have to tell him how I
feel before it's too late!)

text_block_list.name: Romance Manga Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
(It's now or never if I want to be honest with my
feelings!)

text_block_list.name: Romance Manga Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we ride the Ferris wheel before we
go? I'm sure the sunset will be beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on the train home with Mejiro Dober when I
hear her sigh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Amusement parks sure are nice...
choice_data_list: What's this about amusement parks?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-nothing. The characters in this manga I'm
reading went to one...
choice_data_list: There's one nearby. Want to check it out?
There's one nearby. Want to check it out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing... Just me getting too invested in this
manga I'm reading.
choice_data_list: There's one nearby. Want to check it out?
There's one nearby. Want to check it out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: R-really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're so well-prepared that it's scary!
choice_data_list: I mean, it was close to the station, so why not?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, we're here... Are you sure this is okay with
you?
choice_data_list: I mean, it was close to the station, so why not?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why not? Sometimes I don't know why I put up
with you...
choice_data_list:
My bad. I'll treat you to something to make up
for it.

My bad. I'll treat you to something to make up
for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't get me wrong, I'm glad we could come
together, but it was just so random...
choice_data_list:
My bad. I'll treat you to something to make up
for it.

My bad. I'll treat you to something to make up
for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? He's going to get me something by way of
apology? Why does this feel so familiar?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? She's going to get me something by way of
apology? Why does this feel so familiar?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Were you looking at my screen earlier?
choice_data_list: Um, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Never mind, then! Forget I said anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay, um... Good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As an apology for dragging Mejiro Dober around
with me, I buy her some juice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As an apology for dragging Mejiro Dober around
with me, I buy her some juice.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! My juuuuice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I think that girl dropped her drink.
choice_data_list: Hey, are you okay?
Hey, are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I dropped my juice... I just bought it too... Hic!
choice_data_list:
I haven't had any of mine yet, so you can have
it.

I haven't had any of mine yet, so you can have
it.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(No way... This is exactly what happened in the
manga! And after this they...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(No way... This is exactly what happened in the
manga! And after this they...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...End up sh-sharing a drink!
choice_data_list: Whoa, what's wrong?
Whoa, what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Nothing! Nothing at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(What now? It's not like I have to follow the plot
or anything...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(But I feel bad that Trainer doesn't have anything
to drink... Maybe I can offer just one sip...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(No way! I can't possibly do that. I already drank
some of it...)
choice_data_list: Aren't you going to drink that?
Aren't you going to drink that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I am! I will!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... yes. Thank you, I will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we go on numerous rides together, but
Mejiro Dober is distracted and distant the entire
time.
choice_data_list: Sorry about today.
Sorry about today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What are you apologizing for?
choice_data_list: You didn't seem to enjoy yourself very much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What are you apologizing for?
choice_data_list: You didn't seem to enjoy yourself very much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, I was just... thinking about something...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, I was just... thinking about something...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer has been nothing but kind to me all day,
so why am I acting this way?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(It's now or never if I want to be honest with my
feelings!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... There's one last ride I want to go on, so
come with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer? I'd like to go on the Ferris wheel
before we leave... Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Mejiro Dober's request, we get on the
Ferris wheel, and when we reach the very top...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Mejiro Dober's request, we get on the
Ferris wheel, and when we reach the very top...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I, um, just wanted to say... thanks for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you for today. It was really random, but I had a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And just to be clear, I did enjoy myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I think that's because you're here with me. I
just wanted you to know that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We should head home soon. I don't want to miss
curfew.
choice_data_list: Let's come again sometime.
Let's come again sometime.
Where do you want to go next time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We should head home soon. I don't want to miss
curfew.
choice_data_list: Let's come again sometime.
Let's come again sometime.
Where do you want to go next time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll think about it...
choice_data_list: We could invite your friends too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but we should plan it next time.
choice_data_list: We could invite your friends too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That'd be nice... Oh, but that flyer says coming in
pairs gets you a better deal...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That'd be nice... Oh, but that flyer says coming in
pairs gets you a better deal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing about this pair deal, I get curious about
our own tickets, and sure enough...
choice_data_list: W-we got a couple's discount?!
W-we got a couple's discount?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What?! We got in with that deal?! You've got to
be kidding me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, so that's why the staff kept smiling at us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A-and we rode the Ferris wheel together too... Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's face turns a brilliant red, but I'm
sure it's only because of the sunset...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's face turns a brilliant red, but I'm
sure it's only because of the sunset...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There's going to be a next time? That's... f-fine,
but I don't know where I'd want to go...
choice_data_list: We came here because of that manga, right?
We came here because of that manga, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I mean, yeah, I guess.
choice_data_list: Where else do they go in it?
Where else do they go in it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Where else? Well... they just happened to be on
Earth during the latest chapter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They're usually on volcanic planets or in asteroid
debris. Sometimes they even go to other worlds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even on Earth, they're usually at places like the
Mariana Trench or the Bermuda Triangle, so I
don't think that'll be much help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, I can't help but wonder just what
kind of manga she's reading...
